title: cynanchum glabrius
intro: Cynanchum glabrius, also known as Chinese Milk Vetch or Kansui, is a plant species native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cynanchum glabrius include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Cynanchum glabrius is often combined with other herbs, such as ginseng and licorice root, and is commonly consumed as a tea or capsule.
